title: Maik's Black Flash Crit
description: I turned crits into black flashes cuz it scratches my brain
body: After learning simple PvP with some friends, I really felt a rush from critting people out. Not to brag but I was hitting some nasty combos lol. As someone who enjoys JJK, it felt as powerful as hitting a Black Flash, so I was sure a pack existed to do so. It didn't exist for some reason, so I took it upon myself to make it. I hope it gives you the same rush it gives me! <3
